name: Juniper Networks Junos OS webauth_operation.php Unauthenticated File Upload
description: Detects any file upload request to webauth_operation.php for Juniper Networks Junos OS. Such traffic has been known to be utilized in attacks exploiting a remote code execution vulnerability.

filterSets.name: Juniper Networks Junos OS webauth_operation.php Unauthenticated File Upload

author: Brandon Shores
